zh.lifeSummary: 當Fergus Farquhar McFinley於1145年出生在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪時，他的父親Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty55歲，母親Janet46歲。他於1180年與Donalda McHardy在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1210年住在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪。他去世於1210年在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fergus Farquhar McFinley于1145年出生在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty55岁，母亲Janet46岁。他于1180年与Donalda McHardy在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1210年住在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪。他去世于1210年在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: McFinley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionnlaigh, a patronymic from the early personal name Fionnlaoch (see Finley ).

History: William McKinley (1843–1901), 25th US president, was born at Niles, OH, a descendant of David McKinley, known as ‘David the Weaver’, of Scotch–Irish stock, who settled in York County, PA, c. 1743. William McKinley's family were iron founders who tracked the ore from the Susquehanna Valley in PA to Columbiana County, OH.

variants.name: Finley
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (Old Irish Findlaech), from fionn ‘white, fair’ (see Finn ) + laoch ‘hero’, reinforced by an Old Norse name based on finn ‘Finn’ + leikr ‘fight’ or ‘hero’. The name is common in Ireland as well as Scotland.

English: habitational name from one or more lost, unidentified or altered placenames so named, such as Philleyholme, Dorset (recorded as Finelegh in 1280) derived from Old English fīna ‘wood-pecker’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Also a variant of Findlow, from Finlow Hill in Over Alderley, Cheshire (from Old English fīn ‘heap’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’ meaning ‘heaped mound’).

variants.name: Quinley
meanings: English: apparently an altered form of Scottish McKinley or a shortened form of Irish McQuinnelly, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coingheallaigh or Ó Coingheallaigh ‘son (or descendant) of Coingheallach’, a personal name meaning ‘faithful to pledges’. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Fergus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Fearghas , one of the Gaelic names that has recently also been favoured by parents without Irish or Scottish connections.

variants.name: Fearghas
meanings: From Irish fear ‘man’ + gus ‘vigour’; the name of a shadowy hero in Irish mythology, also of the grandfather of St Columba.

nameMeanings.name: Farquhar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of   Fearchar .  In modern use as a given name it may also be a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

en.lifeSummary: When Fergus Farquhar McFinley was born in 1145, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty, was 55 and his mother, Janet, was 46. He married Donalda McHardy in 1180, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom in 1210. He died in 1210, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fergus Farquhar McFinley est né en 1145, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Janet, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Donalda McHardy en 1180, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1210. Il est décédé en 1210, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fergus Farquhar McFinley 1145 in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty 55 und seine Mutter Janet 46. Er hat 1180 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Donalda McHardy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1210 hat er in Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Donalda McHardy nel 1180, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito nel 1210. ja.lifeSummary: Fergus Farquhar McFinleyが1145年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイで生まれた時，父Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromartyは55歳，母Janetは46歳であった。1180年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでDonalda McHardyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1210年にはイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイに住んでいた。彼は1210年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイで65歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Fergus Farquhar McFinley(이)가 1145년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 Donalda McHardy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1210년도에 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티에서 살았다. 그는 1210년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fergus Farquhar McFinley nasceu em 1145, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Janet, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Donalda McHardy em 1180, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom em 1210. Ele faleceu em 1210, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fergus Farquhar McFinley родился в 1145 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Donalda McHardy в 1180 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в 1210 году. Он умер в 1210 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fergus Farquhar McFinley nació en 1145, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Ruari McFinlay Thane of Cromarty, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Janet, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Donalda McHardy en 1180, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido en 1210. Murió en 1210, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
